connect.disconnectedHint: Please connect your Android phone to this computer via USB cable.
connect.unauthorizedHint: Check your phone screen and tap "Allow" to authorize USB debugging.
connect.adbNotFoundHint: Android Debug Bridge (ADB) was not found. Please install Android Platform Tools and make sure "adb" is in your system PATH.
guideSteps: Tap Build Number 7 times. After a few taps you will see a message saying "You are now a developer".
Go back to Settings and tap Developer Options.
Connect your phone to this computer with a USB cable. If a popup asks what to use the USB for, choose File Transfer.
When your phone asks "Allow USB debugging?" — tap Allow.

brands.name: Samsung
brands.path: Settings → About Phone → Software Information → tap Build Number 7 times. Developer Options then appears in the main Settings.

brands.name: Xiaomi / MIUI
brands.path: Settings → About Phone → tap MIUI Version 7 times. Then Settings → Additional Settings → Developer Options.

brands.name: OnePlus
brands.path: Settings → About Device → tap Build Number 7 times. Then Settings → System → Developer Options.

brands.name: Huawei / Honor / Google Pixel
brands.path: Settings → About Phone → tap Build Number 7 times. Then Settings → System → Developer Options.

brands.name: Other
brands.path: Open Settings and find About Phone or About Device. Tap Build Number 7 times. Developer Options will then appear in your main Settings.

setup.title: What would you like to copy?
setup.selectPaths: Please select both a source folder on the phone and a destination folder on this computer before starting.
setup.dateRangeError: "From" date must not be after "To" date.
setup.dateRangeRequired: Please select both a from and to date.

transfer.title: Copying files...
transfer.noFiles: No matching files were found in the selected folder.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.disconnected: Your phone was disconnected during the transfer. Please reconnect it and try again.

browser.inaccessible: ⚠ This folder may not be accessible. Tap "Select this folder" again to use it anyway.
